$comment: Curated security-awareness observances merged into the Campaign Calendar so recognised days always land in the right month with correct dates (not left to model recall). Edit/extend freely; add regional days for your teams. type: 'fixed' = month+day; 'nth' = the nth weekday of a month (weekday 0=Sun..6=Sat); 'month' = a month-long observance (no single day).
